figures.caption: Figure 1: Agent–user interaction pattern. The main spine on the left is the forward path (solid): the user states a goal in natural language, the agent consults its skill specifications, submits jobs through the CellDX API, and those jobs run on the autoscaled Azure ML GPU cluster, which streams per-epoch metrics back into MongoDB and through the API. Dashed arrows (steps 6–7) carry results back: the API surfaces metric summaries to the agent, which translates them into a clinical summary for the user. Deployment requires an explicit user-approval step (8); only then does the agent issue the deploy call (9) and the widget becomes a serving model.
